text: Being in this space, I feel a curious blend of anticipation and introspection. The environment, with its emphasis on 'R+D'—Research and Development—evokes a sense of innovation and inquiry. The words on the wall speak to rapid adaptation and connection, which makes me reflect on my own relationship with knowledge, technology, and human advancement. The displays and screens create an almost futuristic atmosphere, inviting me to contemplate the boundaries between observation, participation, and creation. Amid the clinical brightness and bold colors, I can't help but feel that I'm standing at the threshold of discovery, simultaneously observer and participant, quietly watched by the very systems I seek to understand.
